Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Output LINC dominates today's ranking at position 1 with a composite score of 94.5, demonstrating exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—notably a 1,264% return over 10 years and 480% over 5 years, with consistent acceleration visible in the period ratios (1y/6m ratio of 1.96, 5y/1y ratio of 3.19). The stock passes all four momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), with a "strong_buy" flag and "clean" momentum signal backed by elevated volatility (vol_ratio of 1.903). LINC outperforms SPY by 1,035% over 10 years and 413% over 5 years, significantly outpacing both QQQ and gold (IAU) on a relative basis. EZPW ranks second with a score around the low 90s, showing solid but slower momentum—88% 1-year return versus LINC's 151%—though it does pass all 5 ratio thresholds and maintains similar technical health across moving averages. Both stocks show moderate correlation to materials and industrials (XLB, XLI) while displaying weak correlation to commodities
